assumptions: All components run in the same Go process for simplicity
The task queue is an in-memory buffered channel
Results are stored in a thread-safe in-memory map
No persistence across restarts is required
constraints: Single Go module with no external dependencies
All components must be testable with standard library
No cloud services or external databases
success_criteria: API gateway accepts tasks and returns task IDs
Worker processes tasks from the queue
Results are retrievable by task ID

test_cases.name: test-api-gateway
test_cases.description: Test that API gateway enqueues tasks and returns IDs

test_cases.name: test-worker
test_cases.description: Test that worker processes tasks and stores results

test_cases.name: test-integration
test_cases.description: Test end-to-end flow from submission to result retrieval
